name: Lexar CFexpress Type A Card Gold Series
description: Designed for professional creators who want to capture high-resolution images and cinema-quality 8K video, the Professional CFexpress Type A Card GOLD Series from Lexar delivers read speeds of up to 900 MB/s, write speeds of up to 800 MB/s, and minimum write speeds of 700 MB/s.

features.80GB: 80GB Capacity | Max Read Speed: 900 MB/s | Max Write Speed: 800 MB/s | Min Write Speed: 700 MB/s | VPG-400 Compliant at 400 MB/s | Records 8K, 4K, and HFR Video at 120 fps | Record Raw Photos and Image Bursts | Shock and Vibration Resistant | Temperature Proof
features.160GB: 160GB Capacity | Max Read Speed: 900 MB/s | Max Write Speed: 800 MB/s | Min Write Speed: 700 MB/s | VPG-400 Compliant at 400 MB/s | Records 8K, 4K, and HFR Video at 120 fps | Record Raw Photos and Image Bursts | Shock and Vibration Resistant | Temperature Proof
